subcodes.first_line: O thou dear maidservant of God! Thy likeness (photograph) was received through Mrs. . . . . . . . . and was seen. The light of faith shone in thy brow
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God
